problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
